outlets.name: CNN
outlets.headline: Israel worried Trump will cut a 'bad deal' with Iran, officials say
outlets.summary: Israeli officials tell CNN they fear Trump will make last-minute concessions on Iran's nuclear program to close a deal quickly. Israel demands full enrichment prohibition and dismantling of Fordow and Pickaxe Mountain.

outlets.name: Washington Post
outlets.headline: Hezbollah's unjammable drones pose new threat to Israel — IDF has no solution
outlets.summary: Hezbollah launches largest-ever drone swarm using fiber-optic cable guidance — completely unjammable by electronic warfare. IDF admits it is 'deadlocked' with no viable counter-measure.

outlets.name: Washington Post
outlets.headline: Hegseth, Caine encounter intense bipartisan frustration with Iran war costs and endgame
outlets.summary: Senate Appropriations Committee grills Hegseth and Gen. Caine over $29B war cost, depleted munitions stockpiles, and lack of exit strategy. Both Republicans and Democrats express frustration.

outlets.name: Fox News
outlets.headline: Iran regime insiders may flee to Russia after talks collapse, analyst warns
outlets.summary: Iran regime insiders may seek Assad-style escape to Russia if US-Iran ceasefire talks collapse, according to intelligence analysts. Mojtaba Khamenei's whereabouts still unknown after 60+ days.

outlets.name: Breitbart
outlets.headline: Trump: 'They'll either do the right thing, or we'll finish the job' — departs for Beijing
outlets.summary: Trump arrives in Beijing for summit with Xi Jinping, warning Iran to accept US terms. Rejects Iran's counter-proposal as 'the weakest' response he's ever read.

outlets.name: Al Jazeera
outlets.headline: Iran War Day 75: Trump-Xi talks loom in Beijing as tensions rise in Gulf
outlets.summary: Trump arrives in Beijing for Xi summit as ceasefire remains on 'massive life support.' Iran threatens 90% uranium enrichment. Hezbollah launches largest drone swarm ever. Chinese VLCC makes rare Hormuz exit.

outlets.name: Bloomberg
outlets.headline: Chinese oil supertanker makes rare exit from Strait of Hormuz ahead of Trump-Xi summit
outlets.summary: COSCO/Sinopec VLCC Yuan Hua Hu exits Hormuz laden with Iraqi crude — only 3rd Chinese supertanker transit since war began. Timed just before Trump-Xi summit opens in Beijing.

outlets.name: Euronews
outlets.headline: Pentagon confirms $29 billion spent on Iran war so far amid munitions depletion concerns
outlets.summary: Acting Pentagon comptroller confirms war cost climbed to $29B. Up to 50% of key munition types expended. Rebuilding stockpiles will take 1-4 years.

outlets.name: Times of Israel
outlets.headline: Trump says US will 'finish the job' against Iran — 'peacefully or otherwise'
outlets.summary: Trump arrives in Beijing threatening to 'finish the job' if Iran does not accept US terms. Called Iran 'militarily defeated' and said it must accept the reality of its situation.

outlets.name: Haaretz
outlets.headline: Hezbollah fires explosive drones at Israel — two killed in Lebanon as strikes continue
outlets.summary: Hezbollah fires largest-ever drone swarm at northern Israel. 8 killed in Israeli strikes near Beirut and southern Lebanon. IDF declares drone threat 'deadlocked'.

outlets.name: PressTV
outlets.headline: Iran armed forces ready to respond to any aggression — Speaker Ghalibaf
outlets.summary: Parliament Speaker Ghalibaf warns Iran's armed forces are ready to 'teach a lesson' for any aggression. Says Iran's 14-point proposal is the only option: 'There is no alternative.'

outlets.name: Iran International
outlets.headline: Iran MP threatens weapons-grade 90% enrichment if US resumes military strikes
outlets.summary: MP Rezaei (National Security Committee) warns parliament could discuss enriching uranium to 90% weapons-grade if US resumes strikes. Iran currently holds ~400kg enriched to 60%.
